name: revalue-sync-bridge-electron
description: Electron desktop bridge for ReValue broker synchronization

scripts.check: node --check src/main.js && node --check src/preload.js && node --check src/renderer/renderer.js && node --check src/services/kisClient.js && node --check src/services/tossClient.js && node --check src/services/updateService.js && node --check scripts/electronBinary.js && node --check scripts/ensure-electron.js && node --check scripts/start.js && node --check scripts/package-win.js && node -e "const { parseDeepLink } = require('./src/services/deepLink'); const parsed = parseDeepLink('revalue://sync?requestId=req-1&token=token-1&callbackUrl=https%3A%2F%2Fexample.com%2Fapi%2Fbridge%2Fsync&broker=toss'); if (!parsed || parsed.broker !== 'toss') throw new Error('deep link parse failed'); console.log('check:ok');"
